summary: Iteration 44 - PDF Arabic/English Names and Role Display - All 16 tests passed. Backend fixes verified: 1) PDF shows 'المدير الإداري' (Admin Manager) instead of 'المشرف' (Supervisor) for Sultan's role at ops stage, 2) PDF shows Sultan's Arabic name 'أ.سلطان الزامل' in signatures section, 3) PDF shows Sultan's English name 'Mr.Sultan Al Zamil' below Arabic name, 4) STAS appears correctly in PDF, 5) Public holidays API returns proper data with dates for frontend to calculate days count.

pdf_stas_display.stas_in_signatures: PASSED - STAS appears correctly in signature section

critical_code_review_comments: role_definitions in professional_pdf.py correctly maps 'ops' and 'hr' to 'المدير الإداري' (Admin Manager)
PDF endpoint /api/transactions/{id}/pdf enriches approval_chain with Arabic names from employees collection
Font styling correctly uses s_name for Arabic (larger) and s_name_en_small for English (smaller)
STAS uses special styling s_name_stas with NAVY color
Public holidays frontend (LeavePage.js) correctly groups consecutive holidays by name+year and counts days
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF Arabic/English name display verified for transaction TXN-2026-0005. Role definitions in professional_pdf.py correctly show 'المدير الإداري' instead of 'المشرف' for ops/hr stages. Sultan's names (أ.سلطان الزامل / Mr.Sultan Al Zamil) appear correctly with Arabic in larger font above English. STAS displays correctly in blue. Public holidays API returns data that frontend groups to show days count.

content_verified: المدير الإداري (Admin Manager) - PRESENT as role label
